title: Version 3.1 — VQL Engine
summary: **Patch intent bands (universal ladder):** `.0` Charter · `.1` Connectra · `.2` Gateway · `.3` Dashboard · `.4` Jobs/S3 · `.5` Satellite · `.6` Observability · `.7` Hardening · `.8` Evidence · `.9` Gate / handoff.
flowcharts:
flowchart TD
    stage["3.1.x VQL Engine"]
    contract["Contract"]
    service["Service"]
    surface["Surface"]
    data["Data"]
    ops["Ops"]
    gate["Release gate"]
    stage --> contract --> gate
    stage --> service --> gate
    stage --> surface --> gate
    stage --> data --> gate
    stage --> ops --> gate

flowchart LR
    ui["filter UI chips and ranges"] --> gql["GraphQL filter input"]
    gql --> conv["get_field_type plus vql_converter"]
    conv --> struct["VQLQuery where order_by cursor"]
    struct --> esq["ToElasticsearchQuery"]
    esq --> hits["ES hit IDs ordered"]
    hits --> pg["PG fetch UUIDs"]
    pg --> out["response rows"]
    out --> gate["3.1 release gate"]
